user.title: Connect to Verizon LTE Extender
user.description: Enter the extender address and its local admin password. The integration logs in directly and manages session tokens automatically.

data_description.password: The password used to sign in to the extender web interface.
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable only when the extender uses a trusted certificate.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant polls the extender. Minimum: 15 seconds.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the extender.
error.dns_error: Home Assistant could not resolve the extender hostname. Try its IP address instead.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid admin password or the extender rejected the login.
error.invalid_host: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS address.
error.network_error: Home Assistant could not open a TCP connection to the extender. Check routing and firewall rules from the Home Assistant host or container.
error.ssl_error: The extender certificate could not be verified. Turn off Verify SSL certificate for the factory self-signed Askey certificate.
error.timeout: The connection timed out. Verify that Home Assistant itself can reach the extender address and port across the subnets.
error.unknown: Unexpected error communicating with the extender.

init.title: Verizon LTE Extender options
init.description: Update the extender connection and polling settings.
